headline: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: At Vulcan Materials, safety is a fundamental expectation of our employees each and every day.  SAG expenses were lower than the prior year adjusted EBITDA margin grew.  Trailing 12 months aggregate cash gross profit per ton continues to move higher with strong realization of our January 1 price increases and our disciplined approach to operational execution.

headline: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) Beats Expectations in Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Construction materials company Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.4% year on year to $1.76 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.35 per share was 22.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
